calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-03-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 9:30am
Judge Pro Tem Nancy Newman, nothing on record, clerk-beth Wilber, Dept. 525:
Cause called for Small claims appeal. No appearance by Respondent. Appellant, JC Morgan Builders, Inc. appearing in Pro Per through Rick Morgan. Mr. Morgan testies in the narrative in response to questions from the Judge. Judge Newman determines the appeal was filed untimely and will be dismissed. No exhibits were retained, nor were any in the file.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-02-2008 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-11-2008 Reset From Apr-11-08 To May-06-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506
